fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal template you are creating.

fields.name: Test Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the report that will be printed if you choose to print a test report from a journal batch.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the report that is printed when you click Post and Print from a journal batch.

fields.name: Force Posting Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a report is printed automatically when you post.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the journal template will be a recurring journal.

fields.name: Test Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is specified in the Test Report ID field.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is specified in the Posting Report ID field.

fields.name: Maint. Posting Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the report that is printed when you post a journal line, where the FA Posting Type field = Maintenance, by clicking Post and Print.

fields.name: Maint. Posting Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is specified in the Maint. Posting Report ID field.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series used to assign document numbers to ledger entries posted from journals.

fields.name: Increment Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies if batch names using this template are automatically incremented. Example: The posting following BATCH001 is automatically named BATCH002.
